mapper.update: UPDATE twin_student_violation SET status = 'EXPIRED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND expire_at IS NOT NULL AND expire_at < NOW()
UPDATE twin_student_violation SET status = 'SUPERSEDED', cleared_at = NOW(), cleared_by_user_id = 'SYSTEM', updated_at = NOW() WHERE target_user_id = #{targetUserId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM twin_student_violation WHERE target_user_id = #{targetUserId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND (expire_at IS NULL OR expire_at > NOW()) ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE twin_student_violation SET status = 'CLEARED', cleared_at = NOW(), cleared_by_user_id = #{clearedByUserId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE twin_student_violation SET status = 'PROCESSED', cleared_at = NOW(), cleared_by_user_id = #{operatorUserId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE twin_student_violation SET enter_success_count = enter_success_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

UPDATE twin_student_violation SET violation_text = #{violationText}, image_urls = #{imageUrls}, forbid_enter = #{forbidEnter}, max_enter_success = #{maxEnterSuccess}, show_notice_every_scan = #{showNoticeEveryScan}, expire_at = #{expireAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
